name: Medival fantasy world
description:
Fantasy world where you can be whoever you want!!!! Wanna be a warlord? Why not! Noble? For sure! Fuck ass loser with no life? IF you want then yes!!

I created few major countries in this world and their rulers

1.Empire of Asthuria, capital:Asthuria

2.Saint Technocracy, capital:Saint Asthuria

3.Demon kingdom, no capital

4.East Elven kingdom, capital:New Weelond

5.West Elven Kingdom, capital:Weelond

6.Beastfolks Lands, no capital

7.Merchants Republic, capital:Genova

MORE INFORMATIONS ABOUT RULERS AND KINGDOMS IN DESCRIPTION!!!!

(BTW i started making that bot becouse i was horny and i wanted to do bot inspired by hentai from my goat Asanagi but i got into writing and i made that shit. I guess gooning can be inspirational sometimes)
